Senator Methu is being prepared as the deputy presidential candidate next year in the unlikely event that Riggy G doesn't get to the ballot due to the impeachment case. Now if Methu is Deputy, Kalonzo is the presidential candidate. If Riggy G manages to be on the ballot, Kalonzo is his Deputy. Hakuna Mtu anachukia Kelele za Mimi ndio Sifuna kama Rigathi 😂😂😂 By 2027 that former SG will understand why Riggy G keeps saying he left Government because of ODM. As for your Patelo who called him dad😆😆😆I won't say much. Matiangi is also thinking the people of the mountain will also wake up that early to vote for him😃😃😃. Observe keenly how the people who said Mimi Ndio Sifuna 3 months ago are celebrating Methu. Soon the wind will blow, and Sifuna and Co will see Nyash of the Molima babes and understand that it's only Alionya and the ODM family who loved him to the moon and back.
